name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual expense reporting causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of using manual spreadsheets and templates.
problem_solved: manual expense reporting leads to compliance issues
